item.title: You(r)Tuber (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Chopkhun never expected his longtime partner to cheat and take over their YouTube channel. Determined to surpass his ex, he starts anew-first step, building a team. Surprisingly, famed cameraman Intouch applies.

(Source: IMDb)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Muea Phom Yak Pen YouTuber Kheang Kap Faen Kao" (เมื่อผมอยากเป็นยูทูปเบอร์แข่งกับแฟนเก่า) by Afternoonmood.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Chopkhun never expected his longtime partner to cheat and take over their YouTube channel. Determined to surpass his ex, he starts anew-first step, building a team. Surprisingly, famed cameraman Intouch applies.

(Source: IMDb)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Muea Phom Yak Pen YouTuber Kheang Kap Faen Kao" (เมื่อผมอยากเป็นยูทูปเบอร์แข่งกับแฟนเก่า) by Afternoonmood.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Where the Sky Meets the Sun (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Where the Sky Meets the Sun is a 2026 Thai Movie Thailand Native title: ขอบฟ้า.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Where the Sky Meets the Sun is a 2026 Thai Movie Thailand Native title: ขอบฟ้า.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: The Prosecutor's Office's Proposal (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 8

Lee Chae Ha, who failed to adapt to life as a police officer, becomes an eighth-grade public prosecutor’s office employee and is assigned to the Danhyeon District Office as an investigator. He has lived his entire life bearing the label of “murderer’s son,” enduring bullying from his peers and violence from his uncle, but this time, he is determined to adjust well to his new job.

He reunites with Prosecutor Ju Tae Seon, a respected figure who once helped clear a false accusation Lee Chae Ha had been wrongfully charged with during his time in the police force. But all he can do now is hear news of him from afar.

Then one day, an incident while they’re on duty together becomes the turning point—and Prosecutor Ju Tae Seon starts to show interest in Lee Chae Ha.

Ju Tae Seon selects Lee Chae Ha as his partner to investigate a murder case he’s been pursuing for years, and proposes that Chae Ha join his team as an investigator under his own office…

(Source: Novel Updates)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "The Prosecutor's Office's Proposal" (검사실의 제안) by He Bok (헤복).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 8

Lee Chae Ha, who failed to adapt to life as a police officer, becomes an eighth-grade public prosecutor’s office employee and is assigned to the Danhyeon District Office as an investigator. He has lived his entire life bearing the label of “murderer’s son,” enduring bullying from his peers and violence from his uncle, but this time, he is determined to adjust well to his new job.

He reunites with Prosecutor Ju Tae Seon, a respected figure who once helped clear a false accusation Lee Chae Ha had been wrongfully charged with during his time in the police force. But all he can do now is hear news of him from afar.

Then one day, an incident while they’re on duty together becomes the turning point—and Prosecutor Ju Tae Seon starts to show interest in Lee Chae Ha.

Ju Tae Seon selects Lee Chae Ha as his partner to investigate a murder case he’s been pursuing for years, and proposes that Chae Ha join his team as an investigator under his own office…

(Source: Novel Updates)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "The Prosecutor's Office's Proposal" (검사실의 제안) by He Bok (헤복).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: The Grim Lover
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 13

"When a man tries to die for love, Death itself refuses to let him go — because their fates are bound by a secret that could change everything."

When a grieving man attempts to end his life to follow the lover he lost in a tragic accident, he encounters a Grim Reaper who looks exactly like him. Bound by fate, the Reaper repeatedly stops him from dying, revealing that their destinies are intertwined.

Amid the mysterious rules of death and the hidden truth behind the accident, an unexpected bond forms — one that may lead him back to love, truth, and the will to live again.

(Source: thai.film)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "The Grim Lover" (The Grim Lover รักลืมตาย) by alittlebixth.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 13

"When a man tries to die for love, Death itself refuses to let him go — because their fates are bound by a secret that could change everything."

When a grieving man attempts to end his life to follow the lover he lost in a tragic accident, he encounters a Grim Reaper who looks exactly like him. Bound by fate, the Reaper repeatedly stops him from dying, revealing that their destinies are intertwined.

Amid the mysterious rules of death and the hidden truth behind the accident, an unexpected bond forms — one that may lead him back to love, truth, and the will to live again.

(Source: thai.film)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "The Grim Lover" (The Grim Lover รักลืมตาย) by alittlebixth.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Summertime (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 12

Yeo Eun Ho and Cha Do Hyeon have been friends all their lives. After 19 years, Eun Ho seems to have a good grasp on Do Hyeon, even knowing that his “perfect” image at school is a façade. But what Eun Ho is absolutely oblivious to is the fact that Do Hyeon has had an obsessive crush on him for years. Though Do Hyeon has been able to keep it a secret in order to slowly ease his way into Eun Ho’s heart, the sudden arrival of a new student named Kwon Yi Hyeon throws a wrench into his plans. What will Do Hyeon do to keep Eun Ho by his side? And will Eun Ho ever realize his best friend’s feelings for him?

(Source: Batoto)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Summer" (하절기) by Iiromill (이로밀).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 12

Yeo Eun Ho and Cha Do Hyeon have been friends all their lives. After 19 years, Eun Ho seems to have a good grasp on Do Hyeon, even knowing that his “perfect” image at school is a façade. But what Eun Ho is absolutely oblivious to is the fact that Do Hyeon has had an obsessive crush on him for years. Though Do Hyeon has been able to keep it a secret in order to slowly ease his way into Eun Ho’s heart, the sudden arrival of a new student named Kwon Yi Hyeon throws a wrench into his plans. What will Do Hyeon do to keep Eun Ho by his side? And will Eun Ho ever realize his best friend’s feelings for him?

(Source: Batoto)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Summer" (하절기) by Iiromill (이로밀).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Soulmates (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 8

After being dumped on his 21st birthday, a plague of bad karma seems to strike Phleng, a second-year fine arts student with a bright smile, and he meets Putter, a handsome, sly ghost claiming to be his soulmate. At the same time, his real-life ship partner Mark, a handsome big-spender type, goes all out trying to win Phleng's heart for real, taking care of him on a boyfriend level. This forces the possessive ghost, who refuses to let anyone steal his soulmate away, to use every ghostly trick in his arsenal against his romantic rival.

(Source: Thai = Tham Studio 19 Facebook || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 8

After being dumped on his 21st birthday, a plague of bad karma seems to strike Phleng, a second-year fine arts student with a bright smile, and he meets Putter, a handsome, sly ghost claiming to be his soulmate. At the same time, his real-life ship partner Mark, a handsome big-spender type, goes all out trying to win Phleng's heart for real, taking care of him on a boyfriend level. This forces the possessive ghost, who refuses to let anyone steal his soulmate away, to use every ghostly trick in his arsenal against his romantic rival.

(Source: Thai = Tham Studio 19 Facebook || Translation = MyDramaList)

item.title: Police in Love (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Marry me? Just six months and we'll divorce.

Inspector Thiartha's mother gives him an ultimatum. To counteract his bad luck, he'll have to marry someone born Monday, the thirteenth of October. As if that weren't hard enough, their first and last names must contain the Thai consonant ro ruea. Turns out that his junior, Police Senior Sergeant Major Mangkorn, was born on exactly that day, name as prescribed, perfect to the last item.

(Source: Thai = argentis_th X; daradaily || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Phanraya Sarawat Thia" (ภรรยาสารวัตรเธียร์) by kanola.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Marry me? Just six months and we'll divorce.

Inspector Thiartha's mother gives him an ultimatum. To counteract his bad luck, he'll have to marry someone born Monday, the thirteenth of October. As if that weren't hard enough, their first and last names must contain the Thai consonant ro ruea. Turns out that his junior, Police Senior Sergeant Major Mangkorn, was born on exactly that day, name as prescribed, perfect to the last item.

(Source: Thai = argentis_th X; daradaily || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Phanraya Sarawat Thia" (ภรรยาสารวัตรเธียร์) by kanola.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Painter of the Night (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 0

Since birth, Na Gyum was an exceptionally talented painter. However, though he had published a few collections under a pseudonym, he had decided to quit painting. Then Seung Ho, a young nobleman, barges into his life. An infamous tyrant notorious for his insatiable lust for creativity, Seung Ho forces Na Gyum to become his private painter. However, the nights that await Na Gyum are beyond anything he could have imagined…

(Source: lezhinus.com) ~~ Adapted from the webtoon "Painter of the Night" (야화첩) by Byeonduck (변덕).

View on MyDramaList

Country: South Korea

item.title: Hug E-Lhee the Musical (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

Noi, the son of a som tam restaurant owner, is stuck working as a waiter though he dreams of being a singer. When his mother falls ill, she entrusts him with the business. He's soon set an additional challenge when a man from the big city moves into town and opens a rival fusion restaurant.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 0

item.title: Dongjeolgi (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 10

Nine years after a certain past incident, Koo Seung Hyeok and Kwon I Hyeon reunite by chance at Nexus, a nightclub tied to an underground crime syndicate. Seung Hyeok now holds power as the club’s manager, while I Hyeon survives as expendable labor. Their reunion is anything but neutral. I Hyeon keeps his distance, but Seung Hyeok confronts him with open hostility, dredging up unresolved resentment that costs I Hyeon his job and reopens wounds neither of them truly healed.

When I Hyeon’s estranged father is diagnosed with cancer, desperation pulls him back into Seung Hyeok’s orbit. Instead of demanding repayment, Seung Hyeok offers a deal that binds them through work and debt. Forced into close proximity, contempt slowly blurs with fixation, and emotions Seung Hyeok calls hatred begin to feel dangerously unstable.

A gay man shaped by rejection and survival, and a violently homophobic man trapped in denial, they are pushed to confront the past they tried to erase. As tensions rise and truths resurface, they must decide whether to keep hurting each other or face a future neither of them ever planned to share.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Winter Season" (동절기) by Iromil (이로밀).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 10

Nine years after a certain past incident, Koo Seung Hyeok and Kwon I Hyeon reunite by chance at Nexus, a nightclub tied to an underground crime syndicate. Seung Hyeok now holds power as the club’s manager, while I Hyeon survives as expendable labor. Their reunion is anything but neutral. I Hyeon keeps his distance, but Seung Hyeok confronts him with open hostility, dredging up unresolved resentment that costs I Hyeon his job and reopens wounds neither of them truly healed.

When I Hyeon’s estranged father is diagnosed with cancer, desperation pulls him back into Seung Hyeok’s orbit. Instead of demanding repayment, Seung Hyeok offers a deal that binds them through work and debt. Forced into close proximity, contempt slowly blurs with fixation, and emotions Seung Hyeok calls hatred begin to feel dangerously unstable.

A gay man shaped by rejection and survival, and a violently homophobic man trapped in denial, they are pushed to confront the past they tried to erase. As tensions rise and truths resurface, they must decide whether to keep hurting each other or face a future neither of them ever planned to share.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Winter Season" (동절기) by Iromil (이로밀).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Connecting to You (2026)
item.description:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 13

Many people have the superpower of seeing something invisible. Jia Kai can't see ghosts, but he can see the different colored threads connecting people. The more threads, the more bonds a person has.

Jia Kai has seen countless threads, but he hasn't been connected to anyone at all. He can't figure out why but has accepted himself as a loner. However, because of a chaotic incident, he meets a policeman named Da Wei and realizes that one silver-grey thread has grown from him to him, connecting them together!

Jia Kai doesn't want to lose the connection, so he takes a part-time job at the police station to get closer to Da Wei. With his superpower, he helps with cases of missing people and objects. They get to know each other better, and the thread between them begins to change color, from silver-grey to yellow, representing friendship, and even to red, representing love. Seeing these changes, Jia Kai realizes that how they feel for each other can't be hidden anymore...

(Source: goldenhorse.org.tw)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Wu Hsien Jen Sheng: Cheng Ko Shih Chieh, Chih Yu Ni Lien Shang Liao Wo" ((無線人生：整個世界，隻有你連上了我) by Beck.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 13

Many people have the superpower of seeing something invisible. Jia Kai can't see ghosts, but he can see the different colored threads connecting people. The more threads, the more bonds a person has.

Jia Kai has seen countless threads, but he hasn't been connected to anyone at all. He can't figure out why but has accepted himself as a loner. However, because of a chaotic incident, he meets a policeman named Da Wei and realizes that one silver-grey thread has grown from him to him, connecting them together!

Jia Kai doesn't want to lose the connection, so he takes a part-time job at the police station to get closer to Da Wei. With his superpower, he helps with cases of missing people and objects. They get to know each other better, and the thread between them begins to change color, from silver-grey to yellow, representing friendship, and even to red, representing love. Seeing these changes, Jia Kai realizes that how they feel for each other can't be hidden anymore...

(Source: goldenhorse.org.tw)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Wu Hsien Jen Sheng: Cheng Ko Shih Chieh, Chih Yu Ni Lien Shang Liao Wo" ((無線人生：整個世界，隻有你連上了我) by Beck.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love Destiny (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jul 14, 2026

Great is a modern, optimistic surgeon from the year 2025 who's always happy to help others. After an accident befalls him, he winds up in the body of Phor Kaew, a man living in the past, despised by all of Ayutthaya. Unsuccessful in finding a way to return to the present, to survive in Kaew's life and by being himself, he gradually comes to win over the people around him.

(Source: Thai = cuuthailand Instagram || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Bupphesanniwat" (บุพเพสันนิวาส) by Rompaeng (รอมแพง). ~~ Co-production with China.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jul 14, 2026

Great is a modern, optimistic surgeon from the year 2025 who's always happy to help others. After an accident befalls him, he winds up in the body of Phor Kaew, a man living in the past, despised by all of Ayutthaya. Unsuccessful in finding a way to return to the present, to survive in Kaew's life and by being himself, he gradually comes to win over the people around him.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Kimi wa Natsu no Naka (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jun 24, 2026

Saeki Chiharu and Toda Wataru are two high school students who share a common hobby. They love to watch movies. After they meet, they become fast friends until one day, their relationship takes a sudden twist. What does it mean to love someone? What can you really do about it? Follow the story of their adolescence and relationship as it unfolds through a brilliant summer.

(Source: TVMaze)

~~ Adapted from the manga "My Summer of You" (君は夏のなか)" by Furuya Nagisa (古矢渚).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jun 24, 2026

Saeki Chiharu and Toda Wataru are two high school students who share a common hobby. They love to watch movies. After they meet, they become fast friends until one day, their relationship takes a sudden twist. What does it mean to love someone? What can you really do about it? Follow the story of their adolescence and relationship as it unfolds through a brilliant summer.

(Source: TVMaze)

~~ Adapted from the manga "My Summer of You" (君は夏のなか)" by Furuya Nagisa (古矢渚).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Lost to Light (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jun 20, 2026

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian.

“I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former national cover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings.

Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart.

Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure?

(Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — Jun 20, 2026

Disband the group?! No way!!! Once an idol group with dreams of stardom, they’re now forced to wear mascots and sing children’s songs for kindergarten kids. Humiliating? Absolutely. Everyone quits. Everyone—except Jeng, the only one who stays beside Boss Sithian.

“I hereby announce—we are recruiting new members!” The new lineup? Main rapper—now helping his dad drive a long-tail boat and his mom sell goods from a pickup truck; main dancer—a former national cover dance champion once representing Thailand in Korea… and now teaching aerobics to grandmas; main vocal—a rescue volunteer who sings to calm people about to jump off buildings.

Then comes the boss’s brutal condition. If you don’t want the group to disband, take this guy on. The artsy guitarist with the boiled-face look—Mai? The annoying guy from the bar last night?! No way! What Jeng doesn’t know… Mai is actually the younger brother of the label’s chairman—and he joins the group with one secret mission: to win Jeng’s heart.

Meanwhile, Boss Sithian must confront his past and ask for help from Bailiu, his high-school ex, now the CEO of a wildly successful music label. Can Bailiu save Ultimate Wolf, a label on the brink of collapse? Will Jeng finally rise to the light—or fall into complete failure?

(Source: UltimateTroop official YouTube)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Ticket to Heaven (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 5

Next Episode: 1 of 5 — May 30, 2026

When troubled Barth moves into his school, young seminarian Tanrak is asked to look after him and put him on the right path. Barth's presence, however, accidentally serves to test Tanrak as he struggles to reconcile his innate feelings with his faith and fears for his future.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 5

Next Episode: 1 of 5 — May 30, 2026

When troubled Barth moves into his school, young seminarian Tanrak is asked to look after him and put him on the right path. Barth's presence, however, accidentally serves to test Tanrak as he struggles to reconcile his innate feelings with his faith and fears for his future.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Payback (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 30, 2026

Sun is a 25-year-old deliveryman with a troubled past. Violence took his brother and mother away, and guilt leads him to redemption—but not to forgetting. Entering Dream Entertainment marks the start of revenge and his reunion with Jay, the intimidating and charismatic company director. Jay believes in strategy over emotion, viewing every relationship as a transaction. Beneath his cool exterior lies a deep, unhealed wound—until the appearance of Sun begins to shake the world Jay once had completely under control.

With Jay stepping in as Sun's sponsor and quietly backing his every move amidst the fierce competition of the showbiz world, the two find themselves entangled in a complex relationship, forced to rely on each other to survive the fight.

(Source: PaybackSeries X; edited by MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the webtoon "Payback" (페이백) written by samk (임상윤) and illustrated by Fujoking (푸죠킹).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 30, 2026

Sun is a 25-year-old deliveryman with a troubled past. Violence took his brother and mother away, and guilt leads him to redemption—but not to forgetting. Entering Dream Entertainment marks the start of revenge and his reunion with Jay, the intimidating and charismatic company director. Jay believes in strategy over emotion, viewing every relationship as a transaction. Beneath his cool exterior lies a deep, unhealed wound—until the appearance of Sun begins to shake the world Jay once had completely under control.

With Jay stepping in as Sun's sponsor and quietly backing his every move amidst the fierce competition of the showbiz world, the two find themselves entangled in a complex relationship, forced to rely on each other to survive the fight.

(Source: PaybackSeries X; edited by MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the webtoon "Payback" (페이백) written by samk (임상윤) and illustrated by Fujoking (푸죠킹).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: A Dog and a Plane (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 29, 2026

After flight attendant Kanit clashes with three EMTs and his bag is accidentally exchanged with EMT Toto's, the chaotic trio borrow his expensive belongings for a night out and they get stolen. When the truth comes out and Toto can't afford to pay Kanit back, he agrees to a trade of labour. Kanit tasks Toto with uncovering his boyfriend's cheating. When he does, however, Toto is bribed by Kanit's pilot boyfriend to keep it quiet. As the two spend more time together and their closeness grows, Toto may begin to regret his lie.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 29, 2026

After flight attendant Kanit clashes with three EMTs and his bag is accidentally exchanged with EMT Toto's, the chaotic trio borrow his expensive belongings for a night out and they get stolen. When the truth comes out and Toto can't afford to pay Kanit back, he agrees to a trade of labour. Kanit tasks Toto with uncovering his boyfriend's cheating. When he does, however, Toto is bribed by Kanit's pilot boyfriend to keep it quiet. As the two spend more time together and their closeness grows, Toto may begin to regret his lie.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love Class Season 3 (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 27, 2026

While competing on an idol survival show together, Hyeon Jae and Su An grew close. However, only Hyeon Jae made the final cut to debut, forcing them to part ways despite their lingering attraction. Years later, they manage to reunite through a project, but it's not the happy reunion they might have hoped for: now that they're more established in the entertainment industry, openly expressing their feelings for each other is even riskier than before.

Fellow idols Jae Min, who's trying to recover his reputation after a scandal, and Khun, who's come to Korea from Thailand in search of a new start, bond through commiserating over their difficult situations, but they too must confront the fact that they might not be able to act on their feelings.

(Source: Viki)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 27, 2026

While competing on an idol survival show together, Hyeon Jae and Su An grew close. However, only Hyeon Jae made the final cut to debut, forcing them to part ways despite their lingering attraction. Years later, they manage to reunite through a project, but it's not the happy reunion they might have hoped for: now that they're more established in the entertainment industry, openly expressing their feelings for each other is even riskier than before.

Fellow idols Jae Min, who's trying to recover his reputation after a scandal, and Khun, who's come to Korea from Thailand in search of a new start, bond through commiserating over their difficult situations, but they too must confront the fact that they might not be able to act on their feelings.

(Source: Viki)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: The Boy and I Who Will Break Up in 100 Days (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 26, 2026

Kasuga Yuma and Hasegawa Itsuki, a same-sex couple, gained attention on social media for being “adorable” after giving an interview about the partnership declaration system for sexual minorities. One day, they received an offer to film a documentary capturing their cohabitation over 100 days. Wanting to promote greater understanding of homosexuality, Yuma accepts the proposal.

However, at that time, Yuma and Itsuki had already broken up. Yuma persuades Itsuki, and the two decide to act as a loving couple in front of the camera. Unaware of the truth, documentary director Kayano Shiho is eager to capture them as they truly are…

Yuma strives to be the perfect partner, while Itsuki feels suffocated by those expectations.

What the camera captures, is it a happy everyday life, or a carefully constructed lie? A story unfolds, documenting 100 days where lies and true feelings intertwine!

(Source: Japanese = MBS || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "100 Nichi Go ni Wakareru Boku to Kare" (100日後に別れる僕と彼) by Asahara Naoto (浅原 ナオト). ~~ Release dates: May 22, 2026 (Ep. 1-2 | Premiere) || May 27, 2026 (Online)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 26, 2026

Kasuga Yuma and Hasegawa Itsuki, a same-sex couple, gained attention on social media for being “adorable” after giving an interview about the partnership declaration system for sexual minorities. One day, they received an offer to film a documentary capturing their cohabitation over 100 days. Wanting to promote greater understanding of homosexuality, Yuma accepts the proposal.

However, at that time, Yuma and Itsuki had already broken up. Yuma persuades Itsuki, and the two decide to act as a loving couple in front of the camera. Unaware of the truth, documentary director Kayano Shiho is eager to capture them as they truly are…

Yuma strives to be the perfect partner, while Itsuki feels suffocated by those expectations.

What the camera captures, is it a happy everyday life, or a carefully constructed lie? A story unfolds, documenting 100 days where lies and true feelings intertwine!

(Source: Japanese = MBS || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "100 Nichi Go ni Wakareru Boku to Kare" (100日後に別れる僕と彼) by Asahara Naoto (浅原 ナオト). ~~ Release dates: May 22, 2026 (Ep. 1-2 | Premiere) || May 27, 2026 (Online)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 8 of 10 — May 25, 2026

When secretly judgmental sales ace Kaji discovers the unexpected charm of his seemingly dull colleague Fukami during an overnight trip, their shared views on love ignite a passionate casual arrangement that slowly blossoms into a genuine romance.

(Source: TMDb)

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun." (やたらやらしい深見くん) by Matsumoto Ayaka (松本あやか).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 8 of 10 — May 25, 2026

When secretly judgmental sales ace Kaji discovers the unexpected charm of his seemingly dull colleague Fukami during an overnight trip, their shared views on love ignite a passionate casual arrangement that slowly blossoms into a genuine romance.

(Source: TMDb)

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Yatara Yarashii Fukami-kun." (やたらやらしい深見くん) by Matsumoto Ayaka (松本あやか).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Life in Smokey Blue (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 8 of 10 — May 25, 2026

Azuma Sakutaro is a 38-year-old gay man who is currently unemployed. In the past, he worked as an ace pharmaceutical sales representative, but when his performance began to decline in his mid-thirties, he became increasingly anxious as people around him moved forward with marriage or career changes. Feeling left behind, he eventually reached his mental and physical limits and suddenly resigned. Now he lives at his sister’s house, spending his days sleeping late and going out at night.

One evening at a gay bar, Sakutaro is nearly forced into a hotel by a man he just met. At that moment, he is helped by Kuji Shizuka, a former coworker and rival from his pharmaceutical company days. Eight years earlier, the two had competed as top sales representatives at the same company, and on the day Kuji left the company, they spent a single night together.

Kuji now works as a medical translator and lives a different life from before. Their unexpected reunion after eight years brings their once-sealed, one-time relationship back to the surface, setting their lives in motion again as they reconnect.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Smoke Blue no Ame Nochi Hare" (スモークブルーの雨のち晴れ) by Hamada Kamome (波真田かもめ).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 8 of 10 — May 25, 2026

Azuma Sakutaro is a 38-year-old gay man who is currently unemployed. In the past, he worked as an ace pharmaceutical sales representative, but when his performance began to decline in his mid-thirties, he became increasingly anxious as people around him moved forward with marriage or career changes. Feeling left behind, he eventually reached his mental and physical limits and suddenly resigned. Now he lives at his sister’s house, spending his days sleeping late and going out at night.

One evening at a gay bar, Sakutaro is nearly forced into a hotel by a man he just met. At that moment, he is helped by Kuji Shizuka, a former coworker and rival from his pharmaceutical company days. Eight years earlier, the two had competed as top sales representatives at the same company, and on the day Kuji left the company, they spent a single night together.

Kuji now works as a medical translator and lives a different life from before. Their unexpected reunion after eight years brings their once-sealed, one-time relationship back to the surface, setting their lives in motion again as they reconnect.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the manga series "Smoke Blue no Ame Nochi Hare" (スモークブルーの雨のち晴れ) by Hamada Kamome (波真田かもめ).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Seoul Trip (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 6 of 6 — May 24, 2026

On the first day of my trip to Seoul, I chased down a man I mistook for a pickpocket, only to end up spending the night with him. To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoul affair.

(Source: TMDb)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 6 of 6 — May 24, 2026

On the first day of my trip to Seoul, I chased down a man I mistook for a pickpocket, only to end up spending the night with him. To my horror, I later found my wallet tucked safely in my bag—and discovered he was actually waiting for an "outcall service." The moment I’m forced to pay my debt with my body instead of cash, a disastrous misunderstanding spirals into a dangerous Seoul affair.

(Source: TMDb)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Flower Boy (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 8

Next Episode: 5 of 8 — May 23, 2026

When a cold-hearted, playboy vice president sets out to save his collapsing company, he captures a beautiful young man from a rare flower tribe—an enchanting being whose natural fragrance mesmerizes everyone around him—to create a revolutionary perfume. But he soon discovers that the fragrance blooms most powerfully only in moments of true love. Determined to exploit this secret, the vice president schemes to steal the young man’s heart, unaware that behind the delicate beauty lies a poisonous thorn—one who harbors a calculated desire for revenge against those who destroyed his village, including the man he is beginning to fall for.

(Source: GagaOOLala)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 8

Next Episode: 5 of 8 — May 23, 2026

When a cold-hearted, playboy vice president sets out to save his collapsing company, he captures a beautiful young man from a rare flower tribe—an enchanting being whose natural fragrance mesmerizes everyone around him—to create a revolutionary perfume. But he soon discovers that the fragrance blooms most powerfully only in moments of true love. Determined to exploit this secret, the vice president schemes to steal the young man’s heart, unaware that behind the delicate beauty lies a poisonous thorn—one who harbors a calculated desire for revenge against those who destroyed his village, including the man he is beginning to fall for.

(Source: GagaOOLala)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Crazy Love, Moo-Moo! (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 3 of 10 — May 23, 2026

When Hia Fu, the eldest son of a Chinese-Thai family in Kanchanaburi and a full-on hopeless romantic, finds himself trying to win over his younger brother's friend Moo—who clearly states he's not into fair-skinned Chinese guys like him—things are bound to get complicated.

The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filled with intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings.

(Source: Viu)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 3 of 10 — May 23, 2026

When Hia Fu, the eldest son of a Chinese-Thai family in Kanchanaburi and a full-on hopeless romantic, finds himself trying to win over his younger brother's friend Moo—who clearly states he's not into fair-skinned Chinese guys like him—things are bound to get complicated.

The chaos begins when the two unexpectedly match on a dating DP without realising who the other person is. From rivals to lovers, their relationship turns into one filled with intense jealousy and undeniable chemistry—yet neither is willing to admit their true feelings.

(Source: Viu)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Phi Fak Chop Thoe Mu" (พี่ฟากชอบเธอมู่) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Love upon a Time (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 9 of 12 — May 22, 2026

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period.

Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is the younger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him.

(Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 9 of 12 — May 22, 2026

Nakhun is an unsuperstitious twenty-year-old student. One day, fate plays a trick on him and he winds up travelling back nearly four hundred years to the Ayutthaya Kingdom. He's mistaken for someone who had gone missing, so Nakhun assumes the identity of Klao and tries to work out the mystery of his disappearance while searching for a way back to his time period.

Klao's friend Phop doesn't believe that Nakhun is the younger brother he knew and keeps an eye trained on him.

(Source: Thai = se-ed.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Love Upon a Time" (ภพเธอ) by littlebbear96.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Journey with You (2026)
item.description:
Country: China

Total Episodes: 8

Next Episode: 4 of 8 — May 22, 2026

After guarding the frontier for three years, Fifth Prince Yin Qi returns to the capital due to a secret letter—only to fall into a deadly trap alongside his closest companion, Pei Yanzhi. At the brink of death, he finally realizes the depth of his feelings.

When he opens his eyes again, he finds himself transported three years in the past. Determined to change their fate, Yin Qi resolves to protect Pei Yanzhi this time. But as hidden truths begin to surface, he discovers that the tragedy of their past life is deeply tied to the one he loves most.

Amid dangerous court intrigue, can a love that spans two lifetimes break free from destiny and rewrite its ending?

(Source: GagaOOLala; edited by Me Myself And I at MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: China

Total Episodes: 8

Next Episode: 4 of 8 — May 22, 2026

After guarding the frontier for three years, Fifth Prince Yin Qi returns to the capital due to a secret letter—only to fall into a deadly trap alongside his closest companion, Pei Yanzhi. At the brink of death, he finally realizes the depth of his feelings.

When he opens his eyes again, he finds himself transported three years in the past. Determined to change their fate, Yin Qi resolves to protect Pei Yanzhi this time. But as hidden truths begin to surface, he discovers that the tragedy of their past life is deeply tied to the one he loves most.

Amid dangerous court intrigue, can a love that spans two lifetimes break free from destiny and rewrite its ending?

(Source: GagaOOLala; edited by Me Myself And I at MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Double Helix (2026)
item.description:
Country: China

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 5 of 12 — May 22, 2026

Like the intertwined strands of a double helix, some lives, once connected, are inseparable by fate.

Spanning across a decade, Cheng Yi Chen and Lu Feng’s story starts in high school, where two seeming opposites are drawn together by an undeniable pull. What starts as rivalry and friendship slowly deepens into something far more fragile, forbidden, and profound. Navigating the blurred lines, the two best friends enter into a budding romance while at University, only to be torn apart abruptly by family expectations and societal judgement.

Separated without warning, Lu Feng is trapped by his family in the United States, while Yi Chen is forced to transfer schools and rebuild a life around the absence of the one person he cannot forget. Oceans apart and with no promise of tomorrow, their love becomes a memory neither can escape.

Years later, the couple reunites in a twist of events when Yi Chen realises his new boss is Lu Feng. Overcoming old wounds, buried truths and misunderstandings, they find their way back to each other, only to be pulled apart once more by family and duties. Caught between the life expected of them and the love that has defined them, Yi Chen and Lu Feng must decide how much they are willing to lose for the chance to finally belong to each other.

(Source: Gagaoolala)

~~Adapted from the novel series "A Round Trip to Love" (双程) by Lan Lin (藍淋).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: China

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 5 of 12 — May 22, 2026

Like the intertwined strands of a double helix, some lives, once connected, are inseparable by fate.

Spanning across a decade, Cheng Yi Chen and Lu Feng’s story starts in high school, where two seeming opposites are drawn together by an undeniable pull. What starts as rivalry and friendship slowly deepens into something far more fragile, forbidden, and profound. Navigating the blurred lines, the two best friends enter into a budding romance while at University, only to be torn apart abruptly by family expectations and societal judgement.

Separated without warning, Lu Feng is trapped by his family in the United States, while Yi Chen is forced to transfer schools and rebuild a life around the absence of the one person he cannot forget. Oceans apart and with no promise of tomorrow, their love becomes a memory neither can escape.

Years later, the couple reunites in a twist of events when Yi Chen realises his new boss is Lu Feng. Overcoming old wounds, buried truths and misunderstandings, they find their way back to each other, only to be pulled apart once more by family and duties. Caught between the life expected of them and the love that has defined them, Yi Chen and Lu Feng must decide how much they are willing to lose for the chance to finally belong to each other.

(Source: Gagaoolala)

~~Adapted from the novel series "A Round Trip to Love" (双程) by Lan Lin (藍淋).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Wishing upon the Shooting Stars (2026)
item.description:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 10 of 12 — May 21, 2026

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront his true desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery.

(Source: MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Kuan Kan Liu Hsing Te Cheng Chueh Fang Shih" (觀看流星的正確方式) by Chung Min Jui (鍾旻瑞).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Taiwan

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 10 of 12 — May 21, 2026

After getting laid off, timid office worker Xiang Yong returns to his hometown from Taipei and makes a wish not to be recognized, only to have it mysteriously come true. Mistaken for a stranger and kicked out by his father, he’s stunned to find the new B&B staff is his high school crush, Hao Wei. As a summer meteor shower approaches, the two reconnect, and Xiang Yong is forced to confront his true desires in a whimsical tale of healing and rediscovery.

(Source: MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Lately, It's Winter Season (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 8

Next Episode: 2 of 8 — May 21, 2026

Tiger, the lonely youngest son of a powerful family, meets classmate Dueannao during football tryouts. Their first clash turns into warmth—one that makes Tiger want to cross the line from friendship into something more.

(Source: WeTV)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Lately, It's Winter Season" (ช่วงนี้เดือนหนาว) by Howlairy.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 8

Next Episode: 2 of 8 — May 21, 2026

Tiger, the lonely youngest son of a powerful family, meets classmate Dueannao during football tryouts. Their first clash turns into warmth—one that makes Tiger want to cross the line from friendship into something more.

(Source: WeTV)

~~ Adapted from the novel "Lately, It's Winter Season" (ช่วงนี้เดือนหนาว) by Howlairy.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Fake Fact Lips (2026)
item.description:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 5 of 10 — May 21, 2026

Ryo and Zen have been rivals since high school. Now they’ve reunited as coworkers after joining the same company’s sales department at the same time. From grades and sports to even the number of Valentine’s chocolates they received, the two have spent years competing over everything. Meeting again at work reignites their old rivalry, and their daily lives quickly turn into a series of new challenges.

One night, after another loss, Zen ends up drinking with Ryo, and their conversation turns to their lack of romantic experience. What starts as playful teasing soon escalates into yet another ridiculous competition. Their stubborn pride refuses to let either of them back down, leading to an unexpected new bet: whoever makes the other fall in love first wins. Thus begins the most ridiculous love rivalry of their lives.

Two capable adults who excel at work but are hopeless when it comes to romance find themselves caught in a clumsy, competitive love battle. But in the end… who will fall first?

(Source: Japanese = cmoa.jp || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the manga "Fake Fact Lips" (フェイクファクトリップス) by Suehiro Machi (末広マチ). ~~ Release dates: Apr 24, 2026 (FOD) || May 1, 2026 (TV).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Japan

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 5 of 10 — May 21, 2026

Ryo and Zen have been rivals since high school. Now they’ve reunited as coworkers after joining the same company’s sales department at the same time. From grades and sports to even the number of Valentine’s chocolates they received, the two have spent years competing over everything. Meeting again at work reignites their old rivalry, and their daily lives quickly turn into a series of new challenges.

One night, after another loss, Zen ends up drinking with Ryo, and their conversation turns to their lack of romantic experience. What starts as playful teasing soon escalates into yet another ridiculous competition. Their stubborn pride refuses to let either of them back down, leading to an unexpected new bet: whoever makes the other fall in love first wins. Thus begins the most ridiculous love rivalry of their lives.

Two capable adults who excel at work but are hopeless when it comes to romance find themselves caught in a clumsy, competitive love battle. But in the end… who will fall first?

(Source: Japanese = cmoa.jp || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the manga "Fake Fact Lips" (フェイクファクトリップス) by Suehiro Machi (末広マチ). ~~ Release dates: Apr 24, 2026 (FOD) || May 1, 2026 (TV).

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Check in to You (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 1 of 6 — May 21, 2026

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedly find themselves falling deeply for one another.

(Source: Strongberry.kr)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 6

Next Episode: 1 of 6 — May 21, 2026

The story follows the chaotic body-swapping journey of two men from 180-degree different worlds who accidentally switch bodies after an unexpected incident. A ‘cold-hearted perfectionist’ who used to push everyone away, and a ‘warm-hearted romanticist’ who was always kind to others. Like oil and water, they never seemed meant to mix. But as they are forced to live each other's lives, they begin to understand their hidden scars, bickering until they unexpectedly find themselves falling deeply for one another.

(Source: Strongberry.kr)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: When Oranges Fall (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 2 of 12 — May 20, 2026

Ko was a boy who adored oranges more than anything in the world—but not just any oranges. They had to be from the tree next door. No other oranges tasted so good or made him as happy. Fragrant, sweet, delicious—everything about those homegrown oranges, Ko loved completely.

Except for one thing: the orange tree's true owner. That boy, the one with the cool name just the same as Ko’s. Everyone called him “Ko Two,” as was customary when two people shared the same name. And so, Ko naturally became “Ko One.” But the similarities ended with their names. Their personalities were complete opposites—as if heaven had sent a masterful celestial being to punish a mischievous little orange demon.

As the story of the two Kos unfolded, they grew—both in body and in the feelings quietly forming in their hearts.

(Source: Thai = Meb || Translation = MyDramaList)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Ton Som Yu Ban Khao Tae Phon Som Lon Ma Ban Rao Talot Loei" (ต้นส้มบ้านเขา แต่ผลส้มหล่นมาบ้านเราตลอดเลย) by Littleskyofme.

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 12

Next Episode: 2 of 12 — May 20, 2026

Ko was a boy who adored oranges more than anything in the world—but not just any oranges. They had to be from the tree next door. No other oranges tasted so good or made him as happy. Fragrant, sweet, delicious—everything about those homegrown oranges, Ko loved completely.

Except for one thing: the orange tree's true owner. That boy, the one with the cool name just the same as Ko’s. Everyone called him “Ko Two,” as was customary when two people shared the same name. And so, Ko naturally became “Ko One.” But the similarities ended with their names. Their personalities were complete opposites—as if heaven had sent a masterful celestial being to punish a mischievous little orange demon.

As the story of the two Kos unfolded, they grew—both in body and in the feelings quietly forming in their hearts.

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Magic Move (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 5 of 10 — May 19, 2026

When an architecture student in his final year accidentally becomes a famous university fortune teller, he pretend-reveals that he was the childhood ship partner of the young heir to a real estate fortune. Although their relationship begins with a lie, it develops into a genuine love.

At the same time, a young man fresh off a failed attempt to become a star in Korea comes back in search of his once-ship partner—who happens to be a particular real estate heir.

(Source: Thai = nextstaronline.com || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 5 of 10 — May 19, 2026

item.title: ChermChey (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 19, 2026

Akkhara, who has been hurt repeatedly in love, finds it hard to believe that he will ever meet true love in this lifetime. One day, he makes a wish at a temple, telling himself to "try one last time." At that very moment, he meets Intha, a rugged and confident bar owner. Intha trusts his instincts and begins pursuing Akkhara openly, but Akkhara, scarred by past pain, cannot bring himself to accept his feelings.

As the two work and live together at ChermChey bar, with alcohol loosening their hearts and everyday care drawing them closer, they gradually go from strangers to becoming the person each wants to protect most.

(Source: GagaOOLala)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Chermchey" (เฉิ่มเชย) by Nottakorn (นทกร).

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 10

Next Episode: 1 of 10 — May 19, 2026

Akkhara, who has been hurt repeatedly in love, finds it hard to believe that he will ever meet true love in this lifetime. One day, he makes a wish at a temple, telling himself to "try one last time." At that very moment, he meets Intha, a rugged and confident bar owner. Intha trusts his instincts and begins pursuing Akkhara openly, but Akkhara, scarred by past pain, cannot bring himself to accept his feelings.

As the two work and live together at ChermChey bar, with alcohol loosening their hearts and everyday care drawing them closer, they gradually go from strangers to becoming the person each wants to protect most.

(Source: GagaOOLala)

~~ Adapted from the web novel "Chermchey" (เฉิ่มเชย) by Nottakorn (นทกร).

item.title: You Need Him (2026)
item.description:
Country: China

Total Episodes: 12

When the cynical rich second-generation heir Li Can Yu meets the sensitive and self-respecting rising star employee Min Tai Yu, an apartment chase that starts as "teasing" leads to a moment of truth illuminated by a single candle in the darkness — revealing that the deepest "need" is the void only they can fill for each other.

(Source: BL-MarsRock YouTube)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: China

Total Episodes: 12

When the cynical rich second-generation heir Li Can Yu meets the sensitive and self-respecting rising star employee Min Tai Yu, an apartment chase that starts as "teasing" leads to a moment of truth illuminated by a single candle in the darkness — revealing that the deepest "need" is the void only they can fill for each other.

(Source: BL-MarsRock YouTube)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Kiss Kiss Sxx Season 2 (2026)
item.description:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 16

> Story 1: Wanna Meet? (만나볼래요?) Seok Min and Jae Ho become connected through their shared love of plants. When Seok Min gets busy and starts neglecting him, Jae Ho feels hurt and decides to team up with his friend Do Jin to make him jealous on purpose, hoping to find out what Seok Min really feels.

> Story 2: Look at Me (시선고정) Gyu Ho is a shut-in nerd whose world always feels blurry. Then Min Seung, an optician who changes both his eyesight and his daily life with one pair of glasses, shows up. Gyu Ho’s eyes slowly stop wandering and start focusing on one person.

> Story 3: Home Sweet Homo (홈스윗호모) Office worker Sang Su is about to move out, while Sung Su, a job seeker, moves into his old place. In the middle of bug disasters, an ex barging in, and late-night ghost rumors, they slowly become a comfortable, home-like presence for each other.

> Story 4: Wreck Off, Kiss On (렉오프, 키스온) Tae Yun, a PD at an adults-only audio platform, secretly harbors a crush on voice actor Ji Hun, violating company rules. However, Ji Hun becomes disillusioned after witnessing Tae Yun treat him like a mere “product”, leading to a misunderstanding between the two.

> Story 5: Sweet Misunderstanding (달콤한 오해) Gi Hyeon and Sun Hu go on a graduation trip. Ki Hyeon plans to spend a quiet, intimate time alone with Sun Hu, but Do Hyeong, the oblivious son of the pension owner, unexpectedly intrudes. Do Hyeong’s attentive care toward Sun Hu and Sun Hu’s seemingly affectionate response fuel Gi Hyeon’s growing jealousy.

> Story 6: Ghost’s First Love (귀신의 첫사랑) As Jeong A begins experiencing strange physical symptoms, a shaman tells her that she is being haunted by a ghost who died without fulfilling her love. That very night, a female ghost appears before her.

> Story 7: The Moment I Reach You (너에게 닿는 순간) Su A has the ability to teleport to any place she has visited before. After saving A Yun at a murder scene, the two share a dreamlike night on the run together.

> Story 8: Under the Skin (언더 더 스킨) Internet streamer Jin Sol is surprised to learn that her long-time supporter, “Bella”, is a woman. From their first meeting, however, she feels an unusual chemistry between them. Over the course of one night, the two open up to each other and build an intimate, special bond.

(Source: Korean = filmmakers.co.kr || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: South Korea

Total Episodes: 16

> Story 1: Wanna Meet? (만나볼래요?) Seok Min and Jae Ho become connected through their shared love of plants. When Seok Min gets busy and starts neglecting him, Jae Ho feels hurt and decides to team up with his friend Do Jin to make him jealous on purpose, hoping to find out what Seok Min really feels.

> Story 2: Look at Me (시선고정) Gyu Ho is a shut-in nerd whose world always feels blurry. Then Min Seung, an optician who changes both his eyesight and his daily life with one pair of glasses, shows up. Gyu Ho’s eyes slowly stop wandering and start focusing on one person.

> Story 3: Home Sweet Homo (홈스윗호모) Office worker Sang Su is about to move out, while Sung Su, a job seeker, moves into his old place. In the middle of bug disasters, an ex barging in, and late-night ghost rumors, they slowly become a comfortable, home-like presence for each other.

> Story 4: Wreck Off, Kiss On (렉오프, 키스온) Tae Yun, a PD at an adults-only audio platform, secretly harbors a crush on voice actor Ji Hun, violating company rules. However, Ji Hun becomes disillusioned after witnessing Tae Yun treat him like a mere “product”, leading to a misunderstanding between the two.

> Story 5: Sweet Misunderstanding (달콤한 오해) Gi Hyeon and Sun Hu go on a graduation trip. Ki Hyeon plans to spend a quiet, intimate time alone with Sun Hu, but Do Hyeong, the oblivious son of the pension owner, unexpectedly intrudes. Do Hyeong’s attentive care toward Sun Hu and Sun Hu’s seemingly affectionate response fuel Gi Hyeon’s growing jealousy.

> Story 6: Ghost’s First Love (귀신의 첫사랑) As Jeong A begins experiencing strange physical symptoms, a shaman tells her that she is being haunted by a ghost who died without fulfilling her love. That very night, a female ghost appears before her.

> Story 7: The Moment I Reach You (너에게 닿는 순간) Su A has the ability to teleport to any place she has visited before. After saving A Yun at a murder scene, the two share a dreamlike night on the run together.

> Story 8: Under the Skin (언더 더 스킨) Internet streamer Jin Sol is surprised to learn that her long-time supporter, “Bella”, is a woman. From their first meeting, however, she feels an unusual chemistry between them. Over the course of one night, the two open up to each other and build an intimate, special bond.

(Source: Korean = filmmakers.co.kr || Translation = MyDramaList)

View on MyDramaList

item.title: Hermoso Season 2 (2026)
item.description:
Country: Philippines

Total Episodes: 13

"They say the sea never gives back what it takes... they were wrong."

For months, the shores of Zamboanga remained silent, and the grief was final. Or so we thought. The impossible happens. A shadow returns to the docks, a familiar face appears in the crowd, and a heart that was presumed stopped is beating once again. Andres is alive.

But as Kyle reaches out for the man he lost, he realizes that some resurrections come at a devastating price. Andres isn't alone. He is in the arms of someone else—someone who has claimed the space that once belonged to Kyle.

The reunion isn't a fairy tale; it’s a confrontation with a new, cold reality. What happens when the love of your life returns, but doesn't belong to you anymore?

The tides have turned. The secrets are deeper. The desire is dangerous.

(Source: oxinfilms Instagram)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Philippines

Total Episodes: 13

"They say the sea never gives back what it takes... they were wrong."

For months, the shores of Zamboanga remained silent, and the grief was final. Or so we thought. The impossible happens. A shadow returns to the docks, a familiar face appears in the crowd, and a heart that was presumed stopped is beating once again. Andres is alive.

But as Kyle reaches out for the man he lost, he realizes that some resurrections come at a devastating price. Andres isn't alone. He is in the arms of someone else—someone who has claimed the space that once belonged to Kyle.

The reunion isn't a fairy tale; it’s a confrontation with a new, cold reality. What happens when the love of your life returns, but doesn't belong to you anymore?

The tides have turned. The secrets are deeper. The desire is dangerous.

(Source: oxinfilms Instagram)

item.title: Hard Nights (2026)
item.description:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 16

Ohn, a 54-year-old cartoonist who made a name for himself with his hit series called “Kittima: The Sorceress of Spellbound City,” is at a fragile stage in his life. These days, his creations fail to hit his mark, his health has been deteriorating, and the love he shares with Jira—a 55-year-old marketeer and his partner of nearly seven years—has begun to feel painfully fragile. What were once days filled with laughter have grown quiet. Cumulative stress starts taking a toll on his sleep. And that’s not all. A fortune teller told Ohn that this year his life would be shattered.

Upon their anniversary, Ohn faces a relentless a series of misfortunes. A promising job slips through his fingers. While carrying an anniversary cake from a shop, he was struck by a motorcycle, injuring his arm and messing up the cake completely. After he returned home, Jira continued to ignore him like he’s not there. Eventually, both let out emotional outbursts. All of a sudden, a question popped up in their mind: Can they keep their love alive?

Determined not to give up, Ohn and Jira decide to fight for their relationship. Fortunately, Ohn and Jira still keep in touch with a group of Ohn’s high school friends called Spectrum Fabulous, primarily including Chon, a tattoo artist, and Thai, a music producer, as well as Nidnoi, Chon’s girlfriend and the youngest in the group. These close friends are the ones who always keep Ohn and Jira grounded. Having people who love them around enables both to see a way out of the problem in order to save their lives from a downward spiral and their partner relationship as well.

(Source: Thai PBS)

View on MyDramaList
item.content:encoded:
Country: Thailand

Total Episodes: 16

Ohn, a 54-year-old cartoonist who made a name for himself with his hit series called “Kittima: The Sorceress of Spellbound City,” is at a fragile stage in his life. These days, his creations fail to hit his mark, his health has been deteriorating, and the love he shares with Jira—a 55-year-old marketeer and his partner of nearly seven years—has begun to feel painfully fragile. What were once days filled with laughter have grown quiet. Cumulative stress starts taking a toll on his sleep. And that’s not all. A fortune teller told Ohn that this year his life would be shattered.

Upon their anniversary, Ohn faces a relentless a series of misfortunes. A promising job slips through his fingers. While carrying an anniversary cake from a shop, he was struck by a motorcycle, injuring his arm and messing up the cake completely. After he returned home, Jira continued to ignore him like he’s not there. Eventually, both let out emotional outbursts. All of a sudden, a question popped up in their mind: Can they keep their love alive?

Determined not to give up, Ohn and Jira decide to fight for their relationship. Fortunately, Ohn and Jira still keep in touch with a group of Ohn’s high school friends called Spectrum Fabulous, primarily including Chon, a tattoo artist, and Thai, a music producer, as well as Nidnoi, Chon’s girlfriend and the youngest in the group. These close friends are the ones who always keep Ohn and Jira grounded. Having people who love them around enables both to see a way out of the problem in order to save their lives from a downward spiral and their partner relationship as well.

(Source: Thai PBS)

View on MyDramaList
